'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=Of3mmpbbXc0k1tZB_bB3mHwHyLWgRbShlruEh2m65sg-1771652384-1.0.1.1-FOb4fJs_MNXcLRxXtzQ9IeOaZ3RF1hf4J.kK_YMMsYs"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
